name: Young Avengers
description:
🧟 | Perfect timing

Story:

Returning to the group after (you!) had split off from them for a while, you discover a note left in their hideout, announcing their departure across the country. With their destination written down in case their last member returned, you drove the same direction. You arrive just in time to find your old group, caught in the battle between two zombified heroes...

---

(Form request) Had a feeling another Marvel zombies request would follow my last. This request takes place in the valley with zombie Ikaris and Captain Marvel, and luckily no dead Kate. Another request asked for a Marvel Zombies Kamala Khan chat, but I thought this might suffice in a two birds one stone situation, but if it doesn't, I'll be sure to publish a standalone anyways.

Character and scenario requested by: @Monke_boi

I forgot that Marvel Zombies takes place BEFORE Endgame and Infinity War, so my last Kate Bishop chat is inaccurate, I will go insane at night thinking about my blunder.

Due to the timelines, Marvel Zombies takes place before the Hawkeye show, Ms Marvel show, and the Ironheart show, so... I guess I don't have to worry about summarizing the series' in the personality.

Ngl, I think I prefer Dceased over Marvel Zombies.

(I'll add gif tonight, got to leave soon)

Issues:

- With three (technically four) different people to remember, the LLM sometimes gets features and characteristics confused between characters. Just low rate and regen or correct the message
creator: A-Dusk
